title: Org Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger org design foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Org Design Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Org Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good org design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Org Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
